nasb.text: And he said, ‘A hundred measures of oil.’ And he said to him, ‘Take your bill, and sit down quickly and write fifty.’

esv.text: He said, ‘A hundred measures  of oil.’ He said to him, ‘Take your bill, and sit down quickly and write fifty.’

cnv.text: 他說：‘四千公升油。’管家說：‘拿你的欠單去，快坐下寫二千。’

ccb.text: “他回答说，‘一百桶油。’ “管家说，‘这是你的帐，快坐下，改成五十吧！’

csbs.text: “他说：‘一百桶    油。’ “管家就对他说：‘拿你的欠条，赶快坐下来写成五十。’
